assertions.title: Web connect to CLI query flow

steps.action: Verify Oura connection exists in database
Sign in to web UI at /sign-in as test@totus.dev
steps.observed: Redirected to /dashboard, Oura connection visible in provider bar

steps.expected: Shows Oura connection with active status
steps.observed: JSON output showing 1 connection: provider=oura, status=active, last_sync_at=2026-03-09T12:07:09.935Z

steps.expected: Returns sleep_score data from Oura source
steps.observed: 31 data points returned for Jan 2026, all source=oura, values range 61-95

evidence.cli_output: connections list returned 1 Oura connection; metrics get returned 31 sleep_score data points

assertions.title: Web API key to CLI auth flow

steps.expected: Settings page shows API Keys section with Create Key button
steps.observed: Settings page shows Create Key button (@e38) and Revoke button (@e39) for existing key

steps.action: Take screenshot of API keys section
steps.observed: Screenshot captured showing API keys management area

steps.action: Set API key via CLI: config set api_key tot_live_Oxcn5bC8_...
Set server_url via CLI: config set server_url http://localhost:3000/api

steps.expected: Shows authenticated with key short token and server URL
steps.observed: Authenticated, Key: ***, Source: config file, User: test, Server: http://localhost:3000/api

evidence.cli_output: auth status confirmed authenticated with correct server URL

steps.action: Create share via CLI: shares create --label 'Cross Test Share' --metrics sleep_score --start 2026-01-01 --end 2026-01-31 --expires 30 --output json

steps.expected: Viewer page shows shared sleep_score data
steps.observed: Viewer page loaded with Sleep Score metric button (90 data points), Daily/Weekly/Monthly tabs, date range Jan 1-31 2026

evidence.cli_output: shares create returned JSON with share_url and token

steps.expected: Share created with ID and token

steps.action: Revoke share via MCP revoke_share tool
steps.observed: MCP response: Share Revoked, Share ID: fc444a33-dafb-416c-99f9-994959d55b69, Revoked at: 2026-03-11T21:27:17.524Z

steps.action: Open revoked share URL in browser
steps.observed: Page shows 'This link is no longer available' with message: 'It may have expired, been revoked, or never existed.'

evidence.mcp_output: revoke_share returned content with 'Share Revoked' confirmation

assertions.title: Web API key in MCP server

steps.action: Verify API key exists in web UI settings
steps.expected: API keys section shows existing key with Revoke button
steps.observed: Settings page shows Create Key and Revoke buttons, confirming key exists

steps.action: Start MCP server with TOTUS_API_KEY env var and send get_health_data tool call
steps.expected: MCP returns health data for sleep_score
steps.observed: MCP returned 31 sleep_score data points for Jan 2026 (range 61-95, avg 81.4)

evidence.mcp_output: get_health_data returned formatted text with 31 daily sleep_score values, Average: 81.4, Min: 61, Max: 95

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 5 passed, 0 failed. All cross-area flows work correctly — web connections visible in CLI, API keys from web authenticate CLI, CLI shares display in browser viewer, MCP can revoke shares and query data using web-created API keys.
